debates.claim: The 2011 World Cup was hosted solely by India.
evidence: The tournament was co-hosted by India, Sri Lanka, and Bangladesh.

debates.claim: India won their first World Cup title in 2011.
evidence: India claimed their second World Cup title in 2011, 28 years after their first in 1983.

debates.claim: WHO declared COVID-19 a pandemic in January 2020.
evidence: COVID-19 was declared a global pandemic by WHO on March 11, 2020.

debates.claim: Vaccination programs for COVID-19 began in 2019.
evidence: Vaccination programs began globally in late 2020 and early 2021.
